name: Chain Couplings
shortDescription: Coupling chain covers have become standard because they improve safety and extend the life of the chain and sprocket assembly. They prevent contact with moving parts that could catch clothing or cause injury, and they retain lubrication inside the cover, reducing wear and ensuring smoother, more efficient operation.

name: Clamping Plates
description:
Clamping plates are used in linear technology in order to fasten the
timing belts on to the housing.
These plates are available in standard widths from stock.
shortDescription:
Clamping plates are used in linear technology in order to fasten the
timing belts on to the housing.

name: Optibelt VB
description: Description
shortDescription: Due to its versatile applications, the optibelt VB is the classic model among drive belts. Its qualities really come to the fore in difficult drives for agricultural machinery, just as in unusual drive solutions, such as V-flat drives in mechanical engineerin

specifications.Quality attributes: Excellent operating reliability Numerous special designs Electrically conductive Optimum operating features For universal use Uniform power transmission More flexible than wedge belts Friction-resistant cover fabric Temperature range -30°C to +90°C
